name: Thai Green Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Green Chilli, Seeds Removed and Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, heat the coconut milk over moderate heat until it begins to simmer.
2. Stir in the curry paste until fragrant and the oil starts to separate from the cream.
3. Add chicken fillets and cook, stirring frequently, until the chicken changes color.
4. Pour in the remaining coconut milk and enough water to cover the chicken.
5. Add lime leaves and bamboo shoots. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the chicken is tender.
6. Stir in fish sauce, palm sugar, green chilli, and basil. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
7. Transfer to a serving bowl and garnish with fresh basil and chili slices.
TO SERVE:
